welcomeStep.tagline: The workspace where you and AI
welcomeStep.dpccHint: Powered by DPCC API — connect your account in a moment to track your balance.

appearanceStep.title: Make it yours
appearanceStep.subtitle: Pick your vibe. Everything updates live.
appearanceStep.autoGroupDesc: Collapse consecutive tool calls into a single group.
appearanceStep.autoExpandDesc: Briefly open completed tool calls, then collapse them again.
appearanceStep.expandEditWrite: Expand Edit and Write tools by default
appearanceStep.expandEditWriteDesc: Start file edit tool calls open instead of collapsed.
appearanceStep.transparencySupported: See your desktop through the window

permissionsStep.title: Your rules
permissionsStep.subtitle: Set how much freedom Claude gets. Change this anytime.

default.label: Ask Before Edits
default.description: Claude asks for approval before making file changes or running commands.

acceptEdits.label: Accept Edits
acceptEdits.description: File edits are auto-approved, commands still require confirmation.

bypassPermissions.label: Allow All
bypassPermissions.description: Everything runs automatically with no prompts.

accountStep.title: DPCC API
accountStep.subtitle: Connect your DPCC API account so Claude can run — and see your balance at a glance.
accountStep.balanceHint: Optional — only needed if your platform doesn't return balance through the gateway key.
accountStep.gatewayHint: Just your gateway key is enough — Claude runs and your balance shows automatically.

projectStep.title: Your first project
projectStep.subtitle: Point PccAgent at any folder and start building.

agentsStep.title: Connect agents
agentsStep.subtitle: Browse the store and add ACP agents with one click.
agentsStep.builtIn: Claude Code and Codex are already built in.

tourStep.title: What's inside
tourStep.subtitle: A few things that make PccAgent different.
tourStep.spacesDesc: Organize projects into color-coded workspaces. Each space tints the entire UI with its own hue.
tourStep.toolPanelsDesc: Terminal, source control, browser, and more — integrated into the sidebar. Toggle them on and off as you work.

screen.sidebarHint: your threads are in the sidebar
screen.openProjectSubtitle: Choose a folder to anchor your sessions, tools, and file context.
